title: derris denudata
intro: Derris denudata, also known as Derris, is a perennial legume plant native to India and Southeast Asia, belonging to the Fabaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antipyretic effects. The plant is known for its various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating pain and swelling. In herbal preparations, Derris is often used in the form of a paste or powder, applied topically or consumed in small doses, to harness its medicinal properties and alleviate various health issues.
